SEARCH

Package org.gradle.api.tasks.testing.source

@NullMarked package org.gradle.api.tasks.testing.source
Defines different test sources that can be associated to tests. The test source data is serialized from the test worker to the daemon. The class hierarchy is meant to mirror the one in the JUnit Platform (see org.junit.platform.engine.TestSource), but applies to any kind of test.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.gradle.api.tasks.testing
    The unit testing Task implementations.
    org.gradle.api.tasks.testing.junit
    JUnit specific testing classes.
    org.gradle.api.tasks.testing.junitplatform
     
    org.gradle.api.tasks.testing.logging
    Types related to logging of test related information to the console.
    org.gradle.api.tasks.testing.testng
    TestNG specific testing classes.
  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    ClasspathResourceSource
    Classpath resource-based test source.
    ClassSource
    Class-based test source.
    DirectorySource
    Directory-based test source.
    FilePosition
    Position inside a file represented by line and column numbers.
    FileSource
    A test source defined by a single file.
    FilesystemSource
    Filesystem-based test source.
    MethodSource
    Method-based test source.
    NoSource
    The test engine did not declare any sources for the test at all.
    OtherSource
    The test engine declared a test source not recognized by Gradle.
    TestSource
    Representation of the source of a test or container used to navigate to its location by IDEs and build tools.
